overall.description: First-person vehicle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, driving through a rain-soaked neon-lit futuristic city at night. The vehicle navigates through covered highways, commercial streets, pedestrian plazas, and back alleys with heavy cyberpunk aesthetic featuring pink and cyan neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban highway underpass with green barriers

events.description: exits covered underpass into open neon-lit commercial street with wet pavement

agents.ego_description: driving through covered highway underpass and emerging into open commercial district

entered.detail: large concrete highway structure overhead with visible support beams
green painted metal highway barriers lining the right side of the road
illuminated commercial signage with cyan and pink neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment begins driving under a massive concrete highway overpass with green metal barriers lining the road. Around 6 seconds, the vehicle emerges from the sheltered underpass into an open commercial street with wet asphalt reflecting the neon signs of nearby shops.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet urban intersection with traffic barriers and crosswalks

events.description: begins following a red sedan through the wet streets
makes a right turn at intersection following the red vehicle

agents.ego_description: following a red sedan through wet streets and executing a right turn at an intersection

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead with brake lights illuminated, turning right at intersection

entered.detail: red four-door sedan with illuminated taillights driving ahead of the camera vehicle
bright orange construction barriers lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: Driving on wet open streets, the vehicle follows a red sedan through moderate traffic. Orange construction barriers line the right side as the car approaches and executes a right turn at an intersection, with the red sedan leading the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian plaza with pink signage and narrow alleyways

events.description: enters pedestrian-heavy commercial area with prominent pink neon 'Embers' signage
turns left into narrow graffiti-covered alleyway

agents.ego_description: navigating through crowded pedestrian plaza and entering narrow back alley with graffiti walls

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking on sidewalk near the pink neon signs, some with umbrellas

entered.detail: large prominent pink neon sign reading 'Embers' mounted on building facade
open paved area with pedestrians walking between commercial buildings
concrete walls covered in colorful graffiti and street art

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense pedestrian commercial zone dominated by a large pink neon 'Embers' sign. The street narrows as pedestrians walk along the sidewalks near graffiti-covered walls. Around 32 seconds, the vehicle turns left into a narrow alleyway, leaving the main plaza behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered back alley under concrete overpass with digital billboards

events.description: exits narrow alley back onto main road under large concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: driving through narrow graffiti-covered back alley and emerging onto main road beneath overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with thick support columns spanning the road
zebra crossing with yellow and black striped pattern on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: Navigating through a narrow back alley with extensive graffiti coverage on the walls, the vehicle passes under a massive concrete overpass structure. The lighting becomes more artificial and sheltered from the rain. The segment ends as the car emerges back onto a wider main road beneath the highway.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide multi-lane arterial road lined with large digital billboards and elevated highways

agents.ego_description: cruising down wide wet highway lined with large digital advertisements and elevated road structures

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screens displaying colorful cyberpunk advertisements
raised highway ramp structure extending into the distance with support columns

segments.scene_description: The final segment features driving on a wide multi-lane arterial road with large digital billboards on both sides displaying bright advertisements. The road stretches into the distance beneath elevated highway ramps, with wet pavement reflecting the neon lights of the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive from the sheltered depths of a concrete highway underpass into the vibrant, neon-drenched heart of a commercial district. It begins beneath a massive overpass flanked by green metal barriers, moving forward until the vehicle emerges from the shadows onto an open street of wet asphalt reflecting colorful shop signs. As the car follows a red sedan through moderate traffic, the scene shifts past orange construction barriers before executing a right turn at a busy intersection. The environment then expands into a dense pedestrian zone dominated by a glowing pink Embers sign and graffiti-covered walls, finally narrowing as the vehicle turns left into a secluded alleyway.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, graffiti-strewn alleyway into a sprawling, neon-lit urban arterial. It begins by navigating a narrow passage with walls covered in street art, moving beneath the heavy shadow of a massive concrete overpass where the lighting becomes artificial and sheltered. As the vehicle emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens onto a wide main road situated beneath the looming structures of an elevated highway. The environment then expands into a multi-lane thoroughfare lined with towering digital billboards and bright advertisements that cast vivid reflections across the wet pavement. Finally, the camera pushes forward into the distance, immersed in the glowing cyan and pink hues of the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape.
